29844679.title: 5-Azacytidine treatment induces demethylation of DAPK1 and MGMT genes and inhibits growth in canine mammary gland tumor cells.
29844679.summary: The abstract says 5-azacytidine re-induced DAPK1 and increased DAPK1 mRNA expression. This supports an increase-of-amount claim for DAPK1.

rows.subject: Azacitidine
rows.reason: The abstract explicitly says 5-azacytidine increased DAPK1 mRNA expression.

29912157.title: TRPM6 is Essential for Magnesium Uptake and Epithelial Cell Function in the Colon.
29912157.summary: The abstract is about TRPM6/TRPM7 function and pharmacologic inhibition in colon cells. Magnesium is discussed as the transported ion and as a rescue supplement, not as a TRPM6 suppressor.

rows.subject: Magnesium
rows.object: transient receptor potential cation channel subfamily M member 6
rows.reason: The abstract does not say magnesium decreases TRPM6; magnesium supplementation rescued inhibitor-induced defects.
